errors.invalid_credential: Please check your email or password.
errors.wrong_password: Please check your email or password.
errors.user_not_found: We couldn’t find an account matching that information.
errors.email_already_in_use: This email is already registered. Sign in or use a different email.
errors.weak_password: Your password must be at least 6 characters long.
errors.user_disabled: This account is currently unavailable. Please contact support.
errors.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.network_request_failed: Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The request is taking too long. Please try again.
errors.requires_recent_login: For security reasons, please sign in again.
errors.user_token_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.operation_not_allowed: This sign-in method is currently unavailable.
errors.account_exists_with_different_credential: This email is already linked to another sign-in method. Please use that method to sign in.
errors.popup_blocked: The sign-in window was blocked. Please allow pop-ups and try again.
errors.popup_closed_by_user: The sign-in window was closed before completion.
errors.web_storage_unsupported: Sign-in is not available with your current browser settings.
errors.unauthorized_domain: Sign-in is not available on this domain.
errors.internal_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.default: We couldn’t complete the sign-in. Please try again later.
